name: 3D Action Game
description: A 3D action game with player character controller, third-person camera, enemy AI, combat system, health/damage, and particle effects on hits. Targets Three.js/R3F with Rapier physics.

requiredElements.name: character-controller
requiredElements.description: Third-person character controller with WASD movement, jump, and camera-relative direction.

requiredElements.name: third-person-camera
requiredElements.description: Camera that follows the player with orbit, collision avoidance, and smooth lerp.

requiredElements.name: combat-system
requiredElements.description: Attack input, hitbox detection, damage calculation, and hit feedback.

requiredElements.name: enemy-ai
requiredElements.description: Enemies with state machine (idle/chase/attack/die) and pathfinding toward player.

requiredElements.name: health-system
requiredElements.description: Player and enemy health with damage events, death, and respawn.

requiredElements.name: particle-effects
requiredElements.description: Hit sparks, blood, or magic particles on combat impact with fading.

optionalElements.name: physics-ragdoll
optionalElements.description: Ragdoll physics on enemy death via Rapier.

optionalElements.name: post-processing
optionalElements.description: Bloom on magic effects, vignette on low health.

optionalElements.name: audio-feedback
optionalElements.description: 3D positional audio for sword swings, hits, and footsteps.

optionalElements.name: lock-on-targeting
optionalElements.description: Z-targeting style lock-on for focused combat.

qualityRules.description: Camera follows with lerp damping, no snap or jitter.
Hit stop, screen shake, and particle burst on every hit.
Attack inputs are buffered 200ms to chain combos smoothly.
Enemy AI uses a clear state machine, not nested ifs.
Dead enemies dispose geometry/material and remove from scene.
No new Vector3 in useFrame; enemy pooling for instanced rendering.
Bloom pass for magic effects, vignette for low health feedback.
All animation and movement uses delta time.
Character and environment have clear silhouettes and color contrast.

antiPatterns.description: Camera instantly snaps to position — nauseating and unpolished.
Hits have no visual/audio response — combat feels like hitting air.
Enemies get stuck on walls or each other with no pathfinding recovery.
Dead enemies remain in scene graph, accumulating GPU memory.
Movement per-frame not per-delta — game speed varies with framerate.

improvementSuggestions.description: Freeze game for 60ms on hit for impact weight.
Add UnrealBloomPass for magic/weapon glow effects.
Add Rapier ragdoll on enemy death for satisfying kills.

exampleOutputs.label: R3F character controller with delta
